applications.description: Ops decision buttons (Approve/Deny) for hdc-agents task escalations

portal_checklist.notes: Invite the bot to the ops guild with Send Messages. Set Interactions Endpoint URL to https://<hdc-web>/api/discord/interactions. Copy Public Key into public_key and channel snowflake into ops_decisions.channel_id. Mirror the same fields under hdc-agents.defaults.hdc_agents.discord.

applications.notes: Bot token vault key HDC_OPS_DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN; guest also needs webhook HDC_OPS_DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL for non-decision alerts.

portal_checklist.notes: Enable Message Content Intent for Hermes Discord channel replies.

applications.notes: Bot token shared with clumps/services/hermes compose.

applications.description: Example OAuth2 application with redirect URIs from nginx-waf

portal_checklist.notes: Create the application in the Developer Portal before import.

applications.notes: Remove or replace when not used.
